nodes.long_description:
Wall Town Wonders is a mixed reality game that turns your living room into a lively miniature town. Help colorful characters build their world through fun quests and mini-games, unlocking unique buildings and surprises along the way.

💬 "This could win Mixed-Reality Game of the Year!" - **The Elite Institute**

💬 "A Mixed Reality City Builder with Tons of Charm." - **Road To VR**

💬 "Wall Town Wonders is the best surprise of 2024 on Meta!" - **Quel Tizio In VR**

💬 "Wall to wall fun." - **Thumb Culture**

💬 "Charming, cozy, and addictive. I didn't intend to, but played for hours on my first try." - **GameList+**

💬 "One of the best mixed reality experiences to date!" - **Gamekod3**



# Mixed reality cosy life sim city builder:
Dive into a world where you will experience MR like never before, with unique interactions and highly detailed environments.

{1244979130284550}

# Innovative Handtracking and Interactions: 
Experience the magic of interacting with your town's people using just your bare hands, adding a new level of realism and immersion to gameplay.

{877223127628737}

# Gentle and Relaxing Gameplay: 
Play, discover, and nurture your town at your own pace in a tranquil and soothing environment, perfect for unwinding and relaxation.

{2757946757700941}

# Endless Customization and Exploration: 
Collect countless new looks and customization options for your city through gameplay and exploration, ensuring each experience is uniquely tailored to your preferences.
nodes.short_description: Wall town wonders is a Mixed reality cozy life sim city builder where you become the  host of a vibrant community in your living room. Explore their culture, discover their secrets and above all, grow their picturesque town into a magnificent wall town wonder.

nodes.long_description:
Wall Town Wonders est un jeu en réalité mixte qui transforme votre salon en une ville miniature animée. Aidez des personnages colorés à construire leur monde à travers des quêtes amusantes et des mini-jeux, en débloquant des bâtiments uniques et des surprises en cours de route.

💬 "This could win Mixed-Reality Game of the Year!" - **The Elite Institute**

💬 "A Mixed Reality City Builder with Tons of Charm." - **Road To VR**

💬 "Wall Town Wonders is the best surprise of 2024 on Meta!" - **Quel Tizio In VR**

💬 "Wall to wall fun." - **Thumb Culture**

# Constructeur de ville de simulation de vie cosy en réalité mixte :
Plongez dans un monde où vous vivrez la réalité mixte comme jamais auparavant, avec des interactions uniques et des environnements très détaillés.

{1017070536890500}

# Suivi des mains et interactions innovants :
Découvrez la magie d'interagir avec les habitants de votre ville simplement avec vos mains, ajoutant un nouveau niveau de réalisme et d'immersion au jeu.

{3035572349926129}

# Gameplay doux et relaxant :
Jouez, découvrez et développez votre ville à votre propre rythme dans un environnement calme et apaisant, parfait pour la détente.

{866346609038270}

Personnalisation et exploration infinies :
Collectez d'innombrables nouveaux looks et options de personnalisation pour votre ville grâce au jeu et à l'exploration, garantissant que chaque expérience est adaptée à vos préférences.
nodes.short_description: Wall Town Wonders est un simulateur de vie cosy et constructeur de villes en réalité mixte où vous devenez l'hôte d'une communauté vibrante dans votre salon. Explorez leur culture, découvrez leurs secrets et, surtout, faites grandir leur ville pittoresque pour en faire une magnifique merveille de Wall Town.

nodes.long_description:
Wall Town Wonders es un juego de realidad mixta que convierte tu sala de estar en una animada ciudad en miniatura. Ayuda a personajes coloridos a construir su mundo a través de divertidas misiones y minijuegos, desbloqueando edificios únicos y sorpresas en el camino.

💬 "This could win Mixed-Reality Game of the Year!" - **The Elite Institute**

💬 "A Mixed Reality City Builder with Tons of Charm." - **Road To VR**

💬 "Wall Town Wonders is the best surprise of 2024 on Meta!" - **Quel Tizio In VR**

💬 "Wall to wall fun." - **Thumb Culture**

💬 "Charming, cozy, and addictive. I didn't intend to, but played for hours on my first try." - **GameList+**

💬 "One of the best mixed reality experiences to date!" - **Gamekod3**

# Simulador de vida acogedor y constructor de ciudades de realidad mixta:
Sumérgete en un mundo donde experimentarás la realidad mixta como nunca antes, con interacciones únicas y entornos altamente detallados.

{573804565190230}

# Innovador seguimiento de manos e interacciones:

{883358577260144}

Experimenta la magia de interactuar con la gente de tu ciudad usando solo tus manos, añadiendo un nuevo nivel de realismo e inmersión al juego.

# Juego suave y relajante:

{1082825756634967}

Juega, descubre y cuida tu ciudad a tu propio ritmo en un entorno tranquilo y relajante, perfecto para desconectarse y relajarse.



# Personalización y exploración sin fin:
Colecciona innumerables nuevos estilos y opciones de personalización para tu ciudad a través del juego y la exploración, asegurando que cada experiencia esté adaptada a tus preferencias.
nodes.short_description: Wall Town Wonders es un simulador de vida acogedor y constructor de ciudades en realidad mixta, donde te conviertes en el anfitrión de una comunidad vibrante en tu sala de estar. Explora su cultura, descubre sus secretos y, sobre todo, haz que su pintoresca ciudad crezca hasta convertirse en una magnífica maravilla de Wall Town.

nodes.long_description:
Wall Town Wonders is een mixed reality-spel dat uw woonkamer verandert in een levendige miniatuurstad. Help kleurrijke personages hun wereld op te bouwen door middel van leuke missies en minigames, en ontgrendel unieke gebouwen en verrassingen onderweg.

💬 "This could win Mixed-Reality Game of the Year!" - **The Elite Institute**

💬 "A Mixed Reality City Builder with Tons of Charm." - **Road To VR**

💬 "Wall Town Wonders is the best surprise of 2024 on Meta!" - **Quel Tizio In VR**

💬 "Wall to wall fun." - **Thumb Culture**

💬 "Charming, cozy, and addictive. I didn't intend to, but played for hours on my first try." - **GameList+**

💬 "One of the best mixed reality experiences to date!" - **Gamekod3**

# Mixed reality cosy life sim city builder:
Duik in een wereld waar je MR op een geheel nieuwe manier ervaart, met unieke interacties en zeer gedetailleerde omgevingen.

{947146317475488}

# Innovatieve handtracking en interacties:
Ervaar de magie van interactie met de inwoners van je stad met alleen je blote handen, wat een nieuw niveau van realisme en onderdompeling toevoegt aan het spel.

{831823185567324}

# Zacht en ontspannend spel:
Speel, ontdek en verzorg je stad in je eigen tempo in een rustige en ontspannende omgeving, perfect om te ontspannen.

{550346371036788}

# Eindeloze aanpassing en verkenning:
Verzamel talloze nieuwe stijlen en aanpassingsopties voor je stad door middel van gameplay en verkenning, zodat elke ervaring uniek is afgestemd op je voorkeuren.
nodes.short_description: Wall Town Wonders is een mixed reality cozy life sim city builder waarin je de gastheer wordt van een levendige gemeenschap in je woonkamer. Verken hun cultuur, ontdek hun geheimen en laat hun pittoreske stad bovenal uitgroeien tot een prachtig Wall Town Wonder.

nodes.long_description:
Wall Town Wonders ist ein Mixed-Reality-Spiel, das Ihr Wohnzimmer in eine lebendige Miniaturstadt verwandelt. Helfen Sie farbenfrohen Charakteren, ihre Welt durch lustige Quests und Mini-Spiele aufzubauen, und schalten Sie dabei einzigartige Gebäude und Überraschungen frei.

💬 "This could win Mixed-Reality Game of the Year!" - **The Elite Institute**

💬 "A Mixed Reality City Builder with Tons of Charm." - **Road To VR**

💬 "Wall Town Wonders is the best surprise of 2024 on Meta!" - **Quel Tizio In VR**

💬 "Wall to wall fun." - **Thumb Culture**

💬 "Charming, cozy, and addictive. I didn't intend to, but played for hours on my first try." - **GameList+**

💬 "One of the best mixed reality experiences to date!" - **Gamekod3**

# Mixed-Reality-Cosy-Life-Sim-City-Builder:
Tauchen Sie ein in eine Welt, in der Sie MR wie nie zuvor erleben werden, mit einzigartigen Interaktionen und hochdetaillierten Umgebungen.

{1605868950273237}

# Innovatives Handtracking und Interaktionen:
Erleben Sie die Magie, die Menschen Ihrer Stadt nur mit Ihren bloßen Händen zu berühren, was dem Gameplay ein neues Maß an Realismus und Immersion verleiht.

{963123972299553}

# Sanftes und entspannendes Gameplay:
Spielen, entdecken und pflegen Sie Ihre Stadt in Ihrem eigenen Tempo in einer ruhigen und beruhigenden Umgebung, ideal zum Entspannen.

{1112263773568103}

# Unendliche Anpassung und Erkundung:
Sammeln Sie unzählige neue Looks und Anpassungsoptionen für Ihre Stadt durch Gameplay und Erkundung und sorgen Sie dafür, dass jede Erfahrung individuell auf Ihre Vorlieben abgestimmt ist.
nodes.short_description: Wall Town Wonders ist ein Mixed-Reality-Cosy-Life-Sim-City-Builder, in dem Sie Gastgeber einer lebendigen Gemeinschaft in Ihrem Wohnzimmer werden. Erkunden Sie ihre Kultur, entdecken Sie ihre Geheimnisse und vor allem, lassen Sie ihre malerische Stadt zu einem prächtigen Wall Town Wonder heranwachsen.

Thanks,

nodes.change_log:
**🎉 Patch 1.01 for Wall Town Wonders is Live now! 🎉**

Dear Wonderous builders,
We are beyond grateful to have all of you on this journey with us! Your support, feedback, and enthusiasm fuel our efforts to make Wall Town Wonders even better.

Patch 1.01 Notes

🌟 Content Updates**

- Added difficulty modes to the following mini-games:
- Airplane butterfly catching.
- Painting butterfly mini-game.
- Harbor crane mini-game.
- Ninja Quest: Ninjas will sneak around town sabotaging buildings—catch them in time to prevent damage!
- Bring New Characters to Town: Occasionally, new characters will appear in your room—bring them to town for rewards.
- Balloon Quest Update: New balloons may arrive—guide them back to town for rewards.
- Parachute Skins: You can now unlock skins for parachutes!

**🔧 General Fixes**

- Added sound triggers to the airplane and blimp station doors.
- Improved fishing mini-game mechanics.
- Enhanced pathfinding for the lizard—it now navigates corners better and is less likely to get stuck.
- Fixed improperly placed doors in some buildings.
- Added more safeguards to dialogues to reduce the chance of errors.

**🐞 Bug Fixes**

- Fixed crashes caused by audio files and lizard-related activities.
- Resolved issues with:
- Mine upgrades.
- Buildings spawning vertically instead of horizontally.
- Beetles wandering inside farms.
- Missing dialogue bubbles for the mayor.
- Fixed achievement tracking—players should now be able to unlock all achievements.
- Prevented boxes from falling through blimp delivery zones.
- Fixed resource claiming issues after spawn.
- Resolved occasional missing mini-game rewards from the lizard.
- Adjusted lizard mine spawns to avoid placing them near buildings.

**✨ Quality of Life Improvements**

- First-time mini-games now display a helpful dialogue in the menu.
- Enhanced visuals for the plane mini-game pointer.
- Added the ability to rescan your room from within the game.
- All numbers in the interface are now neatly rounded.
- Added mute/unmute buttons in the sound settings.
- Improved French and Italian localizations.
- Increased rewards for the River Jump mini-game and clarified obtainable resources.
- Reduced accidental clicks on mini-game hubs during character interactions.
- Sped up introductory dialogues for less idle time.
- Enhanced feedback when spraying plants in farms.
- Airplane buildings can now be moved even with active quests, preventing soft locks.
- Polished cargo ship mini-game for better rewards.
- Simplified shooting obstacles in the mine mini-game.
- Added clearer resource indicators at blimp drop-off points, including iron delivery. 
- Introduced a lizard cave tutorial quest, explaining how food can be traded for resources via the lizard.
- Updated Chinese localization for Yes/No windows.

**🎥 Animation Fixes**

- Miner now cheers when finding treasures.
- Fixed:
- Airplane landing glitches.
- Characters spawning outside balloons.
- River jump animations being too abrupt.
- The diver now properly dives from the plank.
- Adjusted mushroom harvesting animations for better alignment.
- Bubble people now align properly with the net.
- Fixed mayor glitches when parachuting or being returned to town.

**🎨 Visual Fixes**

- White cross in hatch-clearing now fades out correctly.
- Airplane explosion effects now spawn on the surface.
- Mine visuals no longer flicker upon first entry.
- Resolved issues with the lizard’s visibility when entering the mine.

**🎅 Stay Tuned for December!**

We’d like to remind everyone to leave a review for Wall Town Wonders—your support allows us to keep improving and expanding the game! The next update will arrive in December, and it’s sure to get everyone in a very Xmassy mood. 🎄✨

Thank you again for being part of this journey. We can’t wait for you to enjoy Patch 1.01 and all the exciting things we have planned for the future! 🚀

Kind regards,

Koen
